name: Bhai Manveer Singh (Moga)
body: Bhai Manveer Singh Ji hails from Moga but was serving as Hazoori Raagi in Nanaksar, Bhucho Kalan. We met only briefly during this Kirtan  porgram at my residence and he was short on time so we did not get a chance to speak much. If anyone has more information or recordings of Bhai Manveer Singh Ji, please contact us.
